signals.raw:
US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Announced, Boosting BTC to $72K, ETH to $2.2K, XRP to $1.38 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The ceasefire eases geopolitical tensions, driving risk-on sentiment and rallies across major cryptos: Bitcoin up over 4% to $71,600 (nearing $72,600 channel top), Ethereum up 6% above $2,200 (closing over key resistance), and XRP up 4.35% to $1.37 (rebounding from $1.30 support).[2]
